provider.description: AI provider id override (anthropic/openai/google). When omitted the host's default routes the call.

model.description: Model id override. When omitted the host's default for the chosen provider is used.

temperature.description: AI sampling temperature. Defaults to 0.8 — higher = more creative variation across the angle set.

maxTokens.description: Max output tokens for the AI call. Defaults to 4096; raise if variantCount × per-variant text is large.
